description: Privacy screening validation dataset for >95% accuracy testing

test_cases.text: Please contact me at john.doe@example.com for assistance.

accuracy_requirements.description: System must achieve at least 95% accuracy across all test cases
accuracy_requirements.evaluation_method: True positive detection of expected entities per test case

notes.purpose: Validation dataset for multimodal customer service AI privacy screening
